label: walk
pattern: InstanceSchema; body-part action + movement at a place
gloss: An act in which someone advances from place to place by successive steps on the feet, using the body's own movement rather than being carried.
notes: AST adequacy: lossy — the primes render an act involving body-part action and movement at a place, but cannot carry the criterial foot or leg use, successive stepping, or exclusion of being carried.
